name: Fried Rice with Eggs
recipeIngredient: 5 ounces water chestnuts, canned (or 1 small can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the cooked pork or a substitute like chicken or beef to the skillet.
2. Heat the oil in the skillet; add onions, green peppers, and mushrooms. Sauté until tender.
3. Stir in the cooked rice, sliced water chestnuts, and soy sauce.
4. Lower heat and cook for 7-10 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Mix in the beaten eggs and stir constantly for about 3-4 minutes.
6. Add the cubed pork or other meat; heat for about 1 minute more.
7. Serve while warm.
